title: allow specification of entrypoint in the form of a slice

comments.body: ./bin/podman run --entrypoint='["/bin/bash", "-c", "while true; do sleep 1; done;" ]'   centos
This matches the behaviour of buildah, and would allow a user to specify a multi option entrypoint.

:pushpin: Commit e5d61cb has been approved by `mheon`
